Title: Left landing light inoperative
Description: Landing light bulb burned out on left main gear. Navigation light functioning normally. Right landing light OK.

Title: Oil filler cap O-ring deteriorated
Description: O-ring on oil filler cap is cracked and has lost elasticity. No leakage observed but replacement recommended before next flight.

Title: Engine won't start – fuel issue suspected
Description: Engine fails to start after repeated attempts. Fuel pressure reads normal. Starter engagement confirmed. Vapor lock or possible contaminated fuel suspected.

Title: Static wick missing – left aileron
Description: Static wick found missing from left aileron trailing edge. All other static wicks intact. No precipitation static issues reported in flight.

Title: COM1 intermittent static above FL080
Description: COM1 radio develops intermittent static and occasional dropout above 8,000 ft MSL. COM2 unaffected. Issue began approximately 20 flight hours ago.
